name: Bonita (SS-165)
events: 3 Oct 1942 USS Bonita departed Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
12 Oct 1942 USS Bonita arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard from Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for refit and alterations.
10 Apr 1943 With her refit completed, USS Bonita, arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
14 May 1943 USS Bonita departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
15 May 1943 USS Bonita arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
15 Jul 1943 USS Bonita departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
16 Jul 1943 USS Bonita arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
29 Aug 1943 USS Bonita departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
3 Dec 1944 USS Bonita arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
16 Feb 1945 USS Bonita arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard for decommissioning.
